title: Render Pass
lore: Zone Render's gym OP — guitars rendered at 120% and the chorus vector-locks on every downbeat.
artistPersona: Mecha-anime opening producer — guitars rendered at vector speed, choruses that hit like a frame launch. Vocal tracks only; no real idol or band likeness.
albumConcept: Zone Render's OP debut — guitars at render speed, choruses that vector-lock on the downbeat, orbital-frame adrenaline.
